summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bolt AI App Builder. Backend APIs working excellently with streaming functionality, but frontend has critical authentication and routing issues preventing IDE access.

critical_bugs.issue: Login API calls failing with net::ERR_ABORTED
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents access to IDE and all authenticated features

critical_bugs.issue: No routes matched location errors for /login/ide
IDE page not loading - always redirects to login
critical_bugs.impact: Cannot test any IDE functionality including preview, code view, export

integration_issues.issue: Authentication flow broken - login doesn't redirect to dashboard/IDE

passed_tests: Backend: AI streaming generation (2456 tokens received)
Backend: Chat functionality with project context
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend authentication system. Login API calls are failing with net::ERR_ABORTED errors. React Router has configuration issues with /login/ide routes. Authentication flow is completely broken preventing access to IDE. Backend is working excellently with all streaming and premium features functional.
